creator: bsdpr@phoe.frmug.org
text:
Created attachment 188003
Patch providing two additional knobs to select the GUI toolkit

Geeqie is not yet stable enough to use with the GTK 3 toolkit, I added a knob to permit the selection of the used toolkit at compilation time. The default is GTK 2 since this is marked as the stable option in the README. I've also updated the configure options related to map pinpointing.

I'm still a rookie with ports, the joined patch is incomplete: when the GTK2 option is selected we should check that the GPS option is not selected. I don't know how to do that.
